final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 3x3 character expression grid for 赵灵儿 from 仙剑奇侠传.

Style/medium: needs a 3D animation aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be 3x3 grid layout with 9 panels, each panel showing character peeking through a torn hole in white paper
Subject: must include 赵灵儿 across all 9 panels with the following expressions and actions:
  Top-left: winking, adjusting glasses, green sweater
  Top-center: smirking, lowering dark sunglasses, red leather jacket
  Top-right: thinking, finger on chin, yellow hoodie
  Middle-left: big smile, arms resting on edge, black and white striped shirt
  Middle-center: smiling, thumbs up, orange button-up shirt
  Middle-right: neutral, drinking boba tea, blue sweater
  Bottom-left: happy, waving, purple sweater vest over white shirt
  Bottom-center: laughing with eyes closed, arms crossed, pink cardigan
  Bottom-right: silly, poking cheeks, teal sweater
Scene/backdrop: must include torn white paper holes as framing device for each panel
Lighting/mood: needs a cohesive character-grid atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve 赵灵儿 character identity, 3x3 grid structure, 9 distinct outfits and expressions as listed
Avoid:
